title: 21 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including One Dividend King
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 9.6% and a median increase of 6.25%. I've tracked 118 increases in 2022. There are twenty-one increases for next week, up from eighteen last week.

title: Old Dominion Freight Line: I Expect Long-Term Outperformance

title: Down 7% In A Month, Will Old Dominion Freight Line Stock (ODFL) Rebound?
text: Earlier this month, ODFL reported its Q4 results, which topped the street estimates, resulting in higher levels for its stock.

title: Why Are Old Dominion Freight Line Shares Trading Lower Today?
text: Wells Fargo analyst Allison Poliniak-Cusic  raised the price target on Old Dominion Freight Line Inc (NASDAQ: ODFL) to $348 (an upside of 12.5%) from $335 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The analyst notes that as the best-in-class LTL provider, Q4 results reflected the strength in its growth and execution strategy.

title: Why Old Dominion Shares Hit the Fast Lane This Week
text: Earnings came in better than expected.

title: Old Dominion's (ODFL) Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: The year-over-year improvement in the operating ratio at Old Dominion (ODFL) in Q4 bodes well.

title: Old Dominion Freight Line Clocks 31% Revenue Growth In Q4, Tops Street View
text: Old Dominion Freight Line Inc  ODFL reported fourth-quarter revenue growth of 31.4% year-over-year to $1.41 billion, beating the consensus of $1.38 billion. Revenue growth reflects a 16.1% growth in LTL revenue per hundredweight and a 14.3% increase in LTL tons per day.

title: Old Dominion eyes operating ratio in the 60s
text: Less-than-truckload carrier Old Dominion Freight Line raised its long-term margin target Wednesday. The company now expects its operating ratio to improve to 70% (30% operating margin) over time, potentially dipping into the 60s, versus the prior target of 75% (25% operating margin).

title: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Old Dominion (ODFL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.59% and 2.76%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Old Dominion Freight Line Reports Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings Per Diluted Share of $2.41
